en_title: Marvel Comics to Leave New York City for Hollywood After 90 Years
cn_title: 漫威漫画扎根纽约近90年后迁往好莱坞
subtitle: 出版部门大重组
opus_summary: 漫威漫画将结束近90年的纽约运营史，迁往好莱坞并重组出版部门。Steve Wacker将接任总编辑，C.B. Cebulski则赴日本负责亚洲原创内容。

paragraphs.en: Marvel Comics is practically synonymous with New York City. Many of its most iconic characters are based there, and Marvel itself has operated out of NYC for the entirety of its nearly 90-year history. But that's finally set to change, with The Hollywood Reporter writing that Marvel Comics is packing up and moving to Hollywood.
paragraphs.cn: 漫威漫画几乎就是纽约市的代名词。许多标志性角色以此为家，漫威在近90年历史中也始终于纽约运营。但这终于要改变了，《好莱坞报道者》称漫威漫画正在收拾行装，迁往好莱坞。

paragraphs.en: This change is part of a broader effort to restructure Marvel's publishing division and consolidate the entire company in one location. This relocation was announced today at a company town hall presided over by Marvel Studios president Kevin Feige, Marvel’s head of television, animation, comics and franchise Brad Winderbaum and Marvel's general manager, comics and franchise David Abdo.
paragraphs.cn: 这项变动是漫威重组出版部门、把整个公司整合到同一地点的更广泛计划之一。漫威影业总裁凯文·费奇、漫威电视、动画、漫画及特许经营负责人Brad Winderbaum，以及漫画及特许经营总经理David Abdo今日在公司全员大会上宣布迁址。

paragraphs.en: As part of this restructuring, Marvel Comics will also have a new editor-in-chief going forward. Current EiC C.B. Cebulski is being replaced by Steve Wacker, an editor notable for critically acclaimed series like The Superior Spider-Man, Hawkeye, Ms. Marvel, and Daredevil. Wacker also has multimedia experience, having helped spearhead the Marvel's Wastelanders podcast series and previously winning an Emmy for his work on Marvel's 2017 animated series Rocket & Groot. Wacker had previously left Marvel in 2022 to focus on independent projects, but now he's back in the Marvel fold.
paragraphs.cn: 重组后，漫威漫画还将迎来新任总编辑。现任总编辑C.B. Cebulski将由Steve Wacker接替，后者参与过广受好评的《究极蜘蛛侠》《鹰眼》《惊奇女士》和《超胆侠》等系列。他也拥有多媒体经验，曾推动Marvel’s Wastelanders播客，并凭2017年动画《火箭与格鲁特》获得艾美奖。Wacker于2022年离开漫威专注独立项目，如今正式回归。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, Cebulski isn't leaving Marvel, but will instead take on a new position in Japan as editor, Asia originals, part of Marvel's new push into the manga market. Under this new corporate structure, Wacker will report directly to Winderbaum, while Cebulski will be part of Wacker's team.
paragraphs.cn: Cebulski不会离开漫威，而将赴日本担任亚洲原创内容编辑，参与漫威开拓漫画市场的新计划。在新架构下，Wacker直接向Winderbaum汇报，Cebulski则加入Wacker的团队。

paragraphs.en: "New York has played a huge part in who Marvel is as a company, and in the pages of our comics," reads a staff memo obtained by THR. "While our network of writers and artists is now an international operation, New York is still woven into our DNA and that will never change. Our colleagues in New York have helped shape generations of stories and characters, and their contributions to Marvel’s legacy cannot be overstated. We sincerely hope they choose to continue that journey with us in California. We are committed to supporting every affected employee throughout this transition, which will take place over the next 12 months."
paragraphs.cn: 《好莱坞报道者》获得的员工备忘录写道：「纽约对漫威公司的塑造以及漫画内容都发挥了巨大作用。尽管作家和艺术家网络如今已遍布全球，纽约仍刻在我们的DNA里，这永远不会改变。纽约同事帮助塑造了几代故事和角色，他们对漫威传承的贡献怎么强调都不为过。我们真诚希望他们选择与我们一同前往加州继续旅程。未来12个月完成过渡期间，我们承诺支持每一位受影响员工。」

paragraphs.en: This development comes 13 years after DC made a similarly surprising move to relocate to California . Both companies were formerly New York City fixtures, but nothing lasts forever.
paragraphs.cn: 这一变化发生在DC同样出人意料地迁往加州13年后。两家公司过去都是纽约地标，但没有什么会永远不变。

paragraphs.en: In other Marvel news, check out our exclusive interview with Miles Morales: Spider-Man writer Bryan Edward Hill and see our hands-on impressions of the Magic: The Gathering - marvel Super Heroes expansion .
paragraphs.cn: 其他漫威消息方面，可以阅读IGN对《迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯：蜘蛛侠》编剧Bryan Edward Hill的独家采访，以及《万智牌：漫威超级英雄》扩展包的上手体验。
